Mountains looking like heaps of collyrium or their caves
wrapt in vapour, and haloes round the Moon with the colour of
cock's eyes (deep red), are symptoms of rain.
[The commentator says : ZTT^T
The metre is
^ ^ mw
Other indications of rain are the following : Ants shifting
their eggs without any trouble, mating of snakes, climbing down
the trees by snakes and cows' leaping.
[The metre is
c^ftmttFTcTT: f^uTTm qq^clfaTcT^fefaqTcfT: I
qfe ^ qqt cf^T * f^T hen
If the chameleons perched on the tops af trees fix their gaze
on the firmament, and cows (or bulls) look up towards the Sun,
there will be rain ere long.
[It is accepted by scientists that certain animals have uncanny
powers of fore-knowledge of coming events. Nowadays the police
department employs dogs in tracking criminals.
The metre is crnRtf.]
